data.user_prompt: What is Zabble (zabble.org)? What does this company do, what products or systems does it offer, and where is it based?

sections.text:
Zabble appears to be a **waste-analytics and zero-waste software company** that helps organizations measure, manage, and reduce waste using an **AI-enabled SaaS platform** and mobile tools.[1][2][4] The company’s core product is **Zabble Zero™**, which provides real-time waste-stream visibility, AI-powered audits, analytics, and workflow support for sustainability teams.[2][4][5]

What it does:
- Helps organizations pursue **zero waste** by collecting and analyzing waste data in real time.[1][2]
- Uses AI to identify **bin fullness**, **contamination**, and issues from photos, and to analyze **hauler invoices** for anomalies and right-sizing opportunities.[1][4]
- Supports sustainability managers with **building- and floor-level insights**, progress tracking, and targeted awareness campaigns.[2]
- In some materials, Zabble also says it offers tools for **hospitals** and **corporate campuses** to reduce contamination, fines, hauling costs, and landfill waste.[5][6]

What products or systems it offers:
- **Zabble Zero™** mobile/platform software for waste management and analytics.[2][5][6]
- An **AI-powered SaaS platform** for real-time actionable insights and end-to-end waste analytics.[1][4]
- Features such as **AI audits**, **real-time analytics**, **anomaly detection on hauler invoices**, and workflow/feedback-loop tools.[1][4]

Where it is based:
- Zabble, Inc. is listed as being in **Walnut Creek, California, USA**.[1][3]
- One source gives the address as **581 Center St, Walnut Creek, CA 94595-1329**.[1]
- Another source lists a headquarters at **1966 Tice Valley Blvd #105, Walnut Creek, California**.[3]

One note of ambiguity: the domain **zabble.org** shows “Smart Data-Driven Digital Marketing & Real-Time Analytics,” but the company information and product descriptions in the search results consistently point to **Zabble, Inc.** as a **waste-management/zero-waste analytics company** based in Walnut Creek.[1][2][4][7]
